name: Jongmin Choi
title: MS Student in Multimodal AI
university: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST)
bio:
I am an MS student at KAIST, working in the Multimodal AI Lab. My research focuses on multimodal representation learning, with particular interests in audio-visual LLMs, modality gap mitigation, and biologically inspired AI models such as Spiking Neural Networks (SNN).

My current work explores improved optimization algorithms, Audio Deepfake Detection (ADD), and methods for addressing key limitations of audio-centric LLMs. I am always open to discussing research ideas and potential collaborations, so please feel free to reach out!
